title: Mesophil's Cities Classic | Official City Style Pack 🏢
description: The first official Style Pack for Mesophil's Cities
body:
![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Quatryl23/Mesophils-Cities/main/images/headers/mesophils_cities_classic.png)

Mesophil's Cities Classic is an official Style Pack for [Mesophil's Cities](https://modrinth.com/mod/mesophils-cities). It contains structures that generate in the city dimension when loading this datapack.

![TRAILER:](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Quatryl23/Mesophils-Cities/main/images/headers/trailer.png)

<iframe width="850" height="468" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/EkPz0Z5Yd-Q?si=ScF36IUQLibnZF6I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Quatryl23/Mesophils-Cities/main/images/headers/important.png)

**This datapack requires MrCrayfish's Refurbished Furniture Mod to be loaded. This mod is not available on Modrinth, so you have to download it from [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture)**

If your game crashes on startup without a crash report after you added this datapack (and therefore its dependencies), make sure the version of Steam 'n' Rails you installed is the newest version 1.6.13 (alpha)

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Quatryl23/Mesophils-Cities/main/images/headers/performance_note.png)

Right now, this datapack may have a significant performance impact while in the city due to the structures of this mod, containing many electricity-related blocks of the [Refurbished Furniture Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture) which need quite a lot of time to tick. We'll try to release a compatibility mod that improves performance of the ticking system in the future.

![](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Quatryl23/Mesophils-Cities/main/images/headers/used_mods.png)

*   [MrCrayfish´s Refurbished Furniture Mod](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/refurbished-furniture)
*   [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)
*   [Create Steam 'n' Rails](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-steam-n-rails)
*   [Create Railways Navigator](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-railways-navigator)
